name: shipeasy
description: Shipeasy — feature flags, A/B experiments, event metrics, translations, alert rules, and the in-app feedback/ops inbox, in a single plugin. Ships 12 skills (9 area guides + 3 multi-step workflows: shipeasy-ops-install, the shipeasy-ops-work loop, and its shipeasy-ops-trigger scheduler); larger skills route from a thin SKILL.md into per-topic references/. Bundles the shipeasy MCP server; all day-to-day CRUD is delegated to the MCP tools or the shipeasy CLI, and deletions are UI-only.
